## Summary

Describe the proposed improvement.

## Problem

Explain the user or project problem this solves.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the preferred approach at a high level.

## Scope

- Product behavior
- Repository structure
- Architecture
- Developer experience
- Documentation
- Other

## Additional Context

Include tradeoffs, alternatives, or related references.
